description_long: This is a compact, utilitarian desk lamp with a rounded, slightly conical metal shade and a flexible gooseneck arm attached to a circular base. The lamp is finished in a matte, off-white or light gray color, showing some signs of wear and surface texture. A visible power cord extends from the base, featuring an inline switch and a standard two-prong plug, indicating it is electrically powered. The lamp's design is functional, with ventilation holes at the rear of the shade for heat dissipation. The base is weighted and flat, providing stability for placement on flat surfaces such as desks or tables. The overall aesthetic is simple and industrial, with no overt decorative embellishments.
description: A small, matte-finished desk lamp with a flexible neck, circular base, and visible power cord with switch. The design is utilitarian and functional, with a slightly worn, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the conical shade, flexible neck, circular base, and the full length of the power cord with switch and plug.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the ventilation holes on the back of the shade, the gooseneck attachment, and the cord trailing behind the base.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the profile of the lamp, the curvature of the neck, and the orientation of the shade relative to the base.
description_view_3: View from behind the shade, focusing on the back of the lamp head and the base, with the cord and plug visible trailing away.
